summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive refs were detected, low-signal and instant-close paths are disabled by the job artifact, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked. All ten seed PRs should remain open for their existing proof/maintainer-review lanes.

actions.reason: Focused config/behavior PR with proof and review history; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard.
Useful focused PR, but proof and review-bot findings block closure or merge classification; keep open for proof/review path.
Focused bug fix with sufficient proof; should remain open for maintainer technical review, not closed by inventory cleanup.
Large message-delivery PR with insufficient proof; keep open rather than close or infer supersession from closed context.
Feature/config PR needing proof and technical review; no safe closeout path in this job.
Focused Slack message-delivery PR that requires proof/maintainer judgment; keep open.
Small focused performance PR with proof; keep open for normal author/maintainer lane.
Even if this is low-signal docs-shaped, the low-signal close path is disabled; keep open for maintainer look.
Provider compatibility fix remains plausible but unproven; keep open rather than close or fix because fix PRs are disabled.
Focused P1 cron/message-delivery PR with recent author activity and proof; keep open for maintainer review.
